raw_consumer_statement: Scammers attacked my credit card destroying my good credit rating so how can I get my good credit rating returned to the way it has been all of my life? It was with Citi VISA card number and some were even made up numbers. I paid and closed my Citi credit cards but still receive fishing via email and via USPS. I am XXXX and scammers prey uipon XXXX women.
